Component.name: NativeBobbing
Component.Description:
Applies a smooth vertical bobbing motion to an entity using native C++ code. Demonstrates how to integrate native calculations via JNI with the ECS system.
The bobbing motion is computed using a sine wave: offset = amplitude * sin(2π * frequency * time)
Usage: entity.setComponent(NativeBobbing( amplitude = 0.3f, // 0.3 meters up and down frequency = 1.0f // 1 cycle per second ))
Attributes: - amplitude: Maximum vertical displacement in meters (default 0.2) - frequency: Oscillation speed in Hz - cycles per second (default 1.0)
